duplicates.recommendation: Extract to scripts/utils/primo.py with configurable institution
Align all to use QueryService or intent agent path

fragmented.impact: Users face multiple entry points with no guidance
Records link to different Primo instances per UI
WebSocket loses Phase 2 entirely with no warning
QA testers cannot submit corrections from QA Tool

historical.reason: Built before two-phase architecture, frozen at earlier stage
Built before API existed, now admin/debug utilities
Built as dev aid, superseded by structured Workbench views

overlaps.difference: HTTP uses two-phase architecture; WebSocket uses old single-phase. Different conversation engines.
overlaps.recommendation: Deprecate or upgrade WebSocket to two-phase

overlaps.difference: Different data sources and questions. Complementary.
Chat UI links TAU; Workbench links NLI
